Package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus

Class CgmStatusV2Response

java.lang.Object
com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message
com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.CgmStatusV2Response
public class CgmStatusV2Response extends Message
Returns CGM (Continuous Glucose Monitor) status for Mobi pumps. Binary layout (20 bytes total): offset 0 (1 byte): sessionState - CGMStatusBState ordinal offset 1 (4 bytes): lastCalibrationTimestamp - uint32, pump epoch seconds offset 5 (4 bytes): sensorStartedTimestamp - uint32, pump epoch seconds offset 9 (1 byte): transmitterBatteryStatus - TransmitterBatteryStatus ordinal offset 10 (4 bytes): sessionDuration - uint32, seconds offset 14 (4 bytes): sessionTimeRemaining - uint32, seconds offset 18 (1 byte): cgmSensorType - CGMSensorType ordinal offset 19 (1 byte): gracePeriod - nonzero = true
Response message for CgmStatusV2Request, opCode -65, size 20
Message properties:
 opCode  -65 
 size  20 
 type  MessageType.RESPONSE 
 characteristic  Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS 
 minApi  KnownApiVersion.MOBI_API_V3_5 
 supportedDevices  SupportedDevices.MOBI_ONLY 
 request  CgmStatusV2Request 

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    CgmStatusV2Response.CgmSensorType
    CGM sensor types matching the Tandem app's CGMSensorType enum ordinals.
    static enum 
    CgmStatusV2Response.SessionState
    CGM session states matching the Tandem app's CGMStatusBState enum ordinals.
    static enum 
    CgmStatusV2Response.TransmitterBatteryStatus
    TransmitterBatteryStatus ordinals match the Tandem app's enum, which differs slightly from the CGMStatusResponse variant (uses "OKAY" instead of "OK").

    • parse

      public void parse(byte[] raw)
      Parsed fields for CgmStatusV2Response:
      sessionStateIdraw[0] & 0xFF
      sessionStategetSessionState()
      lastCalibrationTimestampBytes.readUint32(raw, 1)
      sensorStartedTimestampBytes.readUint32(raw, 5)
      transmitterBatteryStatusIdraw[9] & 0xFF
      transmitterBatteryStatusgetTransmitterBatteryStatus()
      sessionDurationSecondsBytes.readUint32(raw, 10)
      sessionTimeRemainingSecondsBytes.readUint32(raw, 14)
      cgmSensorTypeIdraw[18] & 0xFF
      cgmSensorTypegetCgmSensorType()
      gracePeriod(raw[19] & 0xFF) != 0

    • buildCargo

      public static byte[] buildCargo(int sessionStateId, long lastCalibrationTimestamp, long sensorStartedTimestamp, int transmitterBatteryStatusId, long sessionDurationSeconds, long sessionTimeRemainingSeconds, int cgmSensorTypeId, boolean gracePeriod)
      Byte layout for CgmStatusV2Response.buildCargo(...):
      OffsetDescription
      0(byte) sessionStateId
      1toUint32(lastCalibrationTimestamp) [byte 0]
      2toUint32(lastCalibrationTimestamp) [byte 1]
      3toUint32(lastCalibrationTimestamp) [byte 2]
      4toUint32(lastCalibrationTimestamp) [byte 3]
      5toUint32(sensorStartedTimestamp) [byte 0]

      7toUint32(sensorStartedTimestamp) [byte 2]
      8toUint32(sensorStartedTimestamp) [byte 3]
      9(byte) transmitterBatteryStatusId
      10toUint32(sessionDurationSeconds) [byte 0]
      11toUint32(sessionDurationSeconds) [byte 1]
      12toUint32(sessionDurationSeconds) [byte 2]
      13toUint32(sessionDurationSeconds) [byte 3]
      14toUint32(sessionTimeRemainingSeconds) [byte 0]

      16toUint32(sessionTimeRemainingSeconds) [byte 2]
      17toUint32(sessionTimeRemainingSeconds) [byte 3]
      18(byte) cgmSensorTypeId
      19(byte) (gracePeriod ? 1 : 0)

    • getTransmitterBatteryStatus

      public CgmStatusV2Response.TransmitterBatteryStatus getTransmitterBatteryStatus()
      Returns:
      the battery status of the CGM transmitter. Ordinals match the Tandem app's TransmitterBatteryStatus enum: 0=UNAVAILABLE, 1=ERROR, 2=EXPIRED, 3=OKAY, 4=OUT_OF_RANGE, 5=UNKNOWN

    • getSessionDurationSeconds

      public long getSessionDurationSeconds()
      Returns:
      the duration of the current CGM session, in seconds

    • getSessionTimeRemainingSeconds

      public long getSessionTimeRemainingSeconds()
      Returns:
      the time remaining in the current CGM session, in seconds

    • getCgmSensorTypeId

      public int getCgmSensorTypeId()

    • getCgmSensorType

      public CgmStatusV2Response.CgmSensorType getCgmSensorType()
      Returns:
      the type of CGM sensor in use

    • isGracePeriod

      public boolean isGracePeriod()
      Returns:
      true if the CGM session is in a grace period
